design_philosophy: Authoritative, functional, and strictly objective. The design relies entirely on grid systems, asymmetric negative space, and sharp typographic contrast. No unnecessary decoration, no rounded corners, no soft shadows. Form strictly follows function to build trust for legal/educational records.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-[#0A0A0A]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#0A0A0A]
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#525252]

layout_and_spacing.navigation: Dashboard requires a stark navigation bar. Top header with 1px bottom border. Include text-based mono Logo and links.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-px) using background colors for borders, or border-collapse style layouts.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside containers (p-6, p-8, p-12) to maintain optical clarity. Forms should use gap-6 or gap-8 between fields.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Containers should have solid 1px borders. Use rounded-none globally (0px border-radius) for a stark, paper-like academic feel.

components.buttons: rounded-none bg-[#0000FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0000CC] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 px-8 py-4 text-sm font-bold tracking-wide. No shadows. Disabled state: bg-[#E5E5E5] text-[#A3A3A3].
components.inputs: rounded-none border-x-0 border-t-0 border-b-2 border-[#E5E5E5] bg-transparent focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#0000FF] px-0 py-3 text-base transition-colors. Label should be uppercase overline style.
components.tables: Grid-aligned. No horizontal stripes. 1px bottom border per row. Left-aligned sans-serif headers, monospace for numerical data or citation IDs. Asymmetrical spacing highlighting key columns.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (#E5E5E5), no shadow. On hover: border darkens to #0A0A0A, no lifting.

motion.interactions: Crisp and instant. No slow fades. Focus on color contrast shifts on hover/active states.
motion.loading_state: Typographic/Geometric loader. A stark monospace percentage counter (0% to 100%) or a heavy black progress bar filling a strict rectangular container. No circular spinners.

image_urls.description: Minimalist architectural grid, perfect for a stark Swiss-style split-screen login page. Overlay with bg-white/40 if needed, but it's highly geometric.

account_creation.layout: Split screen: Left side stark form, right side architectural grid image.

user_profile.layout: Single-column narrow form centered in a large grid cell.
user_profile.fields: Name, Address, DOB (use Shadcn Calendar/DatePicker but with rounded-none and sharp borders), Phone, Email.

citation_search.layout: Massive typographic hero section ('CITATION LOOKUP') followed by a structured form.
citation_search.fields: Name, Citation Number, Zip Code, Search Button.

loading_screen.behavior: Intercept the search submission. Display a full-screen or large-container overlay with a stark, terminal-like 'Searching records...' message and a rigid progress bar simulating a 5-second wait.

results_page.logic: If citation === '87911938c', show Individual's Name, DOB, and 4 mock citations in a strict data table. Otherwise, show a massive, stark 'Citations not found' message.
results_page.layout: Data table uses the Swiss pattern: Monospace citation IDs, generous cell padding, 1px borders.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA / APCA standards against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, inputs, and feedback messages MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Legal Citation Lookup dashboard. Do NOT use standard SaaS aesthetics (no rounded corners, no soft drop shadows).
Apply the Swiss Design ethos: use pure white backgrounds, pure black text, and pure blue (#0000FF) for primary actions.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and JetBrains Mono for data/numbers. Provide yarn add commands for fonts if necessary, or use Google Fonts.
Enforce 'rounded-none' across all Shadcn components (buttons, inputs, cards). Use Shadcn components for forms, select, calendars.
For the 5-second loading screen, implement a React `useEffect` timeout that blocks the UI with a stark typographic progress indicator.
Strictly follow the conditional logic for the results page: Only citation '87911938c' yields results.
Ensure EVERY form input and button has the appropriate `data-testid` attribute as specified in the pages_and_flows section.
Remember you are working with .js files, not .tsx files. Write React components in standard ES6 JavaScript.
